title: betula uber
intro: Betula uber, also known as paper birch, is a deciduous tree species native to Northern Europe and Asia, characterized by its white, papery bark. The medicinal properties of Betula uber lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, providing anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Betula uber include relief from fever, rheumatism, and headaches, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve respiratory function. Betula uber is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with herbal preparations also incorporating the bark's antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
